declare const anyCatcherSymbol: unique symbol; /** * This is just a type that we're using to identify `any` being passed to * function overloads. This is used because of situations like {@link forkJoin}, * where it could return an `Observable<T[]>` or an `Observable<{ [key: K]: T }>`, * so `forkJoin(any)` would mean we need to return `Observable<unknown>`. */ export declare type AnyCatcher = typeof anyCatcherSymbol; export {}; //# sourceMappingURL=AnyCatcher.d.ts.map
